name: SPM marine oil peripheral artery disease and healthy-volunteer study
summary: A short-course enriched marine oil study in healthy volunteers and people with symptomatic peripheral artery disease, with lipid mediator, leukocyte phenotype, and macrophage gene-expression endpoints.
population: Healthy volunteers and participants with symptomatic peripheral artery disease; the publication reports 10 healthy volunteers and 10 PAD participants, while the registry records 30 actual enrollees across PAD, OA, and healthy groups
